title: Number of Connected Components in an Undirected Graph
prompt: You have a graph of n nodes labeled 0..n-1. Given n and an array of edges where edges[i] = [a,b] is an undirected edge, return the number of connected components.
hints: Union-Find: start with n components; each successful union decrements the count.
Or: DFS/BFS marking visited; count starts of new traversals.
pitfalls: Forgetting that unioning two already-joined nodes shouldn't change the count.
followups: Number of operations to make connected (LC 1319).
